utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: Each of the first four requires type and costs; plan provides descriptions and monthly_costs, satisfying 'with costs' though not granular, but costs are provided. total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; the plan provides monthly total and a note, but no annual cost. Therefore total_budget is not fully specified. The other four are fully specified with descriptions and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: Health includes PrimeCare Premium Physical Health and EliteCare Premium Mental Health. In ratings, these map to Primary Health Coverage -> physical_health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan (rating 10) and mental_health -> EliteCare Premium Plan (rating 10). Property coverage: Executive Bundle with PrimeHome Premium Coverage maps to property_protection -> home_content -> PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 10). Travel coverage: PrimeTravel Premium Plan + Business Travel Support add-on maps to mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance -> PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 10) and travel_enhancement_services -> Business Travel Support (rating 10). Additional services: Adjusted In-house Concierge Service does not have a direct item in ground-truth, so it is excluded from mapping.
